patterns.pattern: Subagent says 'Now I'll create' but doesn't write files
patterns.cause: Timeout or tool call generation failure
patterns.solution: Verify files with ls after subagent, do directly if missing

patterns.cause: systemctl restart openclaw-gateway kills active session
patterns.solution: Check state after restart, don't edit config directly
Only use openclaw CLI commands for config changes

patterns.pattern: Screenshot shows Unity loading screen not scene
patterns.cause: WebGL not fully loaded, timeout too short
patterns.solution: Wait 25s after canvas found, use domcontentloaded not networkidle

patterns.pattern: CI build doesn't reflect code changes
patterns.solution: Check WASM timestamp vs commit, force cache-bust URL param

solutions.rate_limit: Wait 60s, switch to free model, retry
solutions.subagent_incomplete: Check output, do task directly if missing
solutions.unity_scene_wrong: Verify WASM timestamp, check code, force cache-bust
